news.summary: New skincare brand Grimoire, founded by Vincent Branchesi and Karim Fadel, has launched, aiming to provide clinically-proven skincare solutions for modern life challenges such as sun exposure, stress, jetlag, and late nights. The company promises to deliver "after-fun" skincare, utilizing high-potency encapsulated ingredients in each formula to rejuvenate and repair the skin. By collaborating directly with Capsum, a pioneering company, Grimoire seeks to democratize luxury skincare.
news.headline: Grimoire, new luxury skincare brand founded in NYC, offers sustainable products for skin restoration and recovery.

news.summary: A recent study by First Insight in Pittsburgh, a company utilizing AI to analyze consumer feedback for retail success, has uncovered insights on the impact of tariffs on customer loyalty. The study indicates that 68% of brand and retail executives anticipate negative customer responses to price hikes, with 73% of consumers admitting they would be irritated by such increases. Surprisingly, 83% of executives still intend to raise prices despite these concerns. This suggests a potential risk to customer loyalty as retailers forge ahead with pricing strategies despite expected backlash.
news.headline: Most consumers unhappy with retailers raising prices, despite 83% of executives planning to do so - survey from First Insight.

news.summary: Depop is set to host a large-scale event in New York City this June, called “New York is on Depop,” to promote secondhand fashion, sustainability, and community-driven style. The campaign will focus on celebrating these elements throughout the city, with activities including exclusive shop drops, limited-edition collaborator collections, and in-person events. This initiative aims to showcase Depop's marketplace and community-focused values not only in NYC but also across the U.S. Keep an eye out for this event that will bring the essence of New York fashion directly to consumers.
news.headline: Depop launches "New York is on Depop" campaign, celebrating secondhand fashion in NYC with shop drops and events.

news.summary: In recent findings by Principal®, the Principal Financial Well-Being IndexSM has plummeted to 6.02 out of 10, a significant decline from 7.8 recorded in November 2024. This marks the lowest level since November 2020. The Index, rated on a scale from 0 to 10, with 0 indicating no faith in business health and outlook, and 10 representing full confidence, shows a noticeable decrease in optimism. This downward trend mirrors the sentiments of businesses amid the COVID pandemic, although current unique macroeconomic uncertainties are also impacting confidence levels.
news.headline: U.S. business confidence hits low: Principal Financial Well-Being Index drops from 7.8 (Nov 2024) to 6.02, lowest since Nov 2020.

news.summary: In Burlington, Ontario, Merz Aesthetics® Canada revealed that Radiesse® has received approval from Health Canada for addressing moderate wrinkles in the décolleté area. Radiesse® is a regenerative biostimulator known for its ability to regenerate various skin tissue components, promoting healthier-looking skin. The approval for treating the décolleté area enhances the product's versatility. This milestone meets patient needs as there has been a growing demand for such treatment options.
news.headline: Merz Aesthetics receives Health Canada approval for RADIESSE as treatment for moderate wrinkles in décolleté area.

news.summary: Buddy.ai, the pioneering conversational AI tutor for children, based in Mountain View, California, has proudly attained full compliance with the Children's Online Privacy Protection Act (COPPA). The kidSAFE Seal Program has officially certified Buddy.ai in recognition of this achievement. With a user base of 20 million kids annually learning English through Buddy, parents can now be reassured of the safety and privacy measures in place. In light of increasing concerns over online safety and privacy, this announcement underscores the commitment of Buddy.ai to provide a secure learning environment for young users.
news.headline: Buddy.ai achieves COPPA certification, ensuring safety for its 20 million annual users, leading in child AI education.

news.summary: APTIM, a company specializing in environmental and resilience solutions, has successfully assisted customers in collectively reducing their annual energy costs by more than $1.49 billion. The firm is notable for its work with various energy efficiency programs, including Entergy Solutions Louisiana, Entergy New Orleans' Energy Smart, and FOCUS ON ENERGY®. The positive impact of these initiatives on energy savings demonstrates APTIM's commitment to providing effective and sustainable solutions to its clients.
news.headline: APTIM's energy efficiency programs save customers $1.49 billion annually, recognized for marketing efforts. Louisiana and Wisconsin programs honored.

news.summary: The rate of new vehicle sales experiencing pull-ahead has decreased, while prices for used and certified used vehicles are on the rise in Grand Rapids, Michigan as of June 5, 2025. In May, new-vehicle inventory dropped to 2.84 million units, marking the lowest level since February 2024. Conversely, the average marketed price for new vehicles is experiencing an upward trend.
news.headline: New vehicle inventory at 15-month low of 2.84 million units, prices rising due to tariffs.

news.summary: In Calgary, Alberta, on June 5, 2025, SMART Technologies, renowned for creating the SMART Board®, is set to unveil three innovative products. These include the SMART Board® Mini, an interactive podium and video conferencing tool, and the SMART Board® M Pro High Secure Series TAA Interactive Display tailored for government use. The new products aim to provide advanced technology solutions for interactive collaboration and secure communication.
news.headline: SMART Technologies introduces 3 new products at InfoComm 2025: SMART Board® Mini, SMART Board® M Pro High series TAA Display.

news.summary: A national initiative called Foster 50 has been launched on June 5, 2025, in Franklin, Tennessee, by PEDIGREE Foundation in collaboration with Animal Welfare leaders. This campaign has been introduced in conjunction with National Foster a Pet Month, aiming to support the foster care of 50,000 pets across the country. The initiative seeks to raise awareness about pet fostering and encourage more individuals to participate in providing temporary homes for animals in need.
news.headline: PEDIGREE Foundation launches Foster 50 campaign encouraging pet parents to foster pets, marking National Foster a Pet Month.

news.summary: De'Longhi, a leading brand in home espresso, has launched two new innovations designed to cater to various coffee preferences. These products offer hands-on personalization, the ability to brew both hot and cold beverages, and feature award-winning Italian design. The release took place on June 5, 2025, in UPPER SADDLE RIVER, N.J. Their commitment to providing options for all types of coffee drinkers is evident in these new offerings.
news.headline: De'Longhi introduces La Specialista Touch and Dedica Duo espresso machines, offering personalization and Italian design.

news.summary: Forty8Fifty Labs has been awarded for its leadership in Atlassian Cloud solutions and dedication to enhancing customer collaboration on a large scale. The recognition was announced on June 5, 2025, in Atlanta. Forty8Fifty Labs is known for their innovative approach and commitment to creating unique solutions. This award solidifies their position as a standout in the industry.
news.headline: Forty8Fifty Labs wins Perforce Gliffy Partner of the Year Award for largest cloud sale, leadership in Atlassian solutions.

news.summary: In a recent development on May 21, 2025, Visionary Health Technology Group Limited, a subsidiary of Visionary Holdings listed on Nasdaq as GV, was formally founded in Hong Kong. This establishment represents a key advancement in Visionary Holdings' strategic expansion into various industries.
news.headline: Visionary Health Tech Group Ltd. established in Hong Kong on May 21. A subsidiary of Visionary Holdings (Nasdaq: GV).

news.summary: On June 5, 2025, in Baltimore, Transamerica introduced the SWBC Retirement Plan Exchange in partnership with SWBC. This initiative aims to enhance retirement benefits cost-effectively and efficiently. The program includes two options, the Retirement Plan Exchange® Solution, with the goal of providing competitive retirement benefits at a reduced cost and administrative burden.
news.headline: Transamerica and SWBC team up for Retirement Plan Exchange to simplify benefits for businesses nationwide.

news.summary: Key findings from the diagnostic Phase II study, DISCO, conducted by Clarity, reveal that 64Cu-SARTATE shows promise as a safe and efficient alternative to standard-of-care (SOC) imaging for identifying lesions in individuals with neuroendocrine tumors (NETs). Results indicate that 64Cu-SARTATE demonstrated superior efficacy in detecting these lesions when compared to traditional imaging methods. The study emphasizes the potential of 64Cu-SARTATE in improving diagnostic accuracy and patient outcomes in the management of NETs.
news.headline: 64Cu-SARTATE highly effective at detecting tumors in NET patients compared to SOC imaging; Phase III planning starts.

news.summary: On June 5, 2025, TP, a major global digital services company, revealed its recent certifications in ISO 37301 Compliance Management Systems (CMS) and ISO 37001 Anti-Bribery Management Systems. These certifications are applicable to TP's operations across the globe, confirming their commitment to stringent compliance and anti-bribery practices. The company's dedication to meeting international standards is evident in achieving these certifications, underscoring their focus on ethical business operations.
news.headline: TP achieved ISO 37301 and ISO 37001 certifications for Compliance and Anti-Bribery Management Systems globally.

news.summary: On June 5, 2025, in West Hartford, Connecticut, Legrand, a leading specialist in electrical and digital building infrastructures, announced their participation at Cisco Live in San Diego from June 8-12 at Booth #2735. Legrand will be present as a trusted infrastructure partner supporting the event's Network.
news.headline: Legrand powers Cisco Live event in San Diego (Booth #2735) with scalable infrastructure. June 8-12, 2025.

news.summary: In Bethesda, Maryland, on June 5, 2025, it was reported that the DWR eDiscovery platform is being utilized by numerous law firms, legal service providers, corporations, and government agencies. This platform assists in organizing, reviewing, and processing litigation data, regardless of size and complexity. Thousands of entities benefit from this service. Moreover, dtSearch, a prominent enterprise and developer in the industry, supports this platform.
news.headline: Digital WarRoom uses dtSearch Engine for scalable eDiscovery platform. Thousands of users access to organize, review, and process litigation data.

news.summary: In Parsippany, New Jersey, Zoetis released its 2024 Sustainability Progress Update titled “Advancing Sustainability in Animal Health for a Better Future.” The report showcases the company's ongoing efforts to meet its Driven to Care goals. This marks Zoetis’ fifth year of reporting on its purpose-driven initiatives in the areas of Communities, Animals, and the Planet. Through these efforts, Zoetis aims to drive long-term value, build stakeholder trust, and support various aspects of sustainability.
news.headline: Zoetis releases 2024 Sustainability Progress Update, focusing on Communities, Animals, and the Planet. Shows continued progress towards achieving Driven to Care goals.

news.summary: Today in FRAMINGHAM, Mass., TJ Maxx (NYSE: TJX) is partnering with co-sponsors Jen Atkin, Carly Cushnie, Renée Elise Goldsberry, Chloe Flower, and Ilona Maher to support 10 promising women. This initiative seeks to provide new possibilities and empower these individuals, marking an important step towards greater opportunities.
news.headline: TJ Maxx partners with Ilona Maher to launch "You Sponsored by TJ Maxx" to sponsor 10 deserving women, announced in Framingham, June 5, 2025.

news.summary: A new solution called Built on Databricks has been introduced to assist customers in simplifying and securing their workflows by utilizing database objects, files, and DABS deployment with guardrails. This offering was launched on June 5, 2025, in San Francisco. Opsera, a prominent AI-driven DevOps platform, serving as a trusted choice for Fortune 1000 enterprises, unveiled this innovation.
news.headline: Opsera introduces DevOps for DataOps solution with Databricks platform to streamline workflows. Trusted by Fortune 1000 companies.

news.summary: In Fairfax City, Virginia, a new brunch and café concept called "Layered." is set to open in June 2025. This venture comes from the same owners behind Chateau de Chantilly and will be housed in a previously vacant commercial property in Old Town Fairfax City. The opening of "Layered." signifies a major milestone in the revitalization efforts of the area. Details regarding the exact opening date are yet to be revealed.
news.headline: New café "Layered." to open in Old Town Fairfax City, transforming long-vacant site; owned by Chateau de Chantilly.
Trump got up early on Thursday morning and made a phone call on his own initiative.

news.summary: A partnership has been forged between CentralSquare Technologies and C1, a global managed services provider, to enhance emergency call handling for public sector organizations. CentralSquare's Vertex NG911 Call Handling solution will be integrated into C1's services, aimed at bolstering the efficiency and precision of emergency calls to Public Service Answering Points. This collaboration signifies a strategic move to elevate the quality of services offered to customers.
news.headline: CentralSquare partners with C1 to offer Vertex NG911 Call Handling; enhances emergency response.

news.summary: A company named UKG, specializing in HR, payroll, and workforce management solutions, revealed its partnership with the City of Detroit, which has been experiencing a notable economic and urban revival. Detroit, which declared bankruptcy in 2013, has since undergone a remarkable resurgence. The city is focusing on data-driven decision-making and cultivating a workplace environment centered on productivity and accountability. This move aims to support Detroit's resilient and thriving community.
news.headline: Detroit partners with UKG to enhance digital transformation, boosting productivity with data-driven decisions. Resilience shown post-bankruptcy in 2013.

news.summary: In a recent study by the MissionSquare Research Institute, significant insights into retirement preparedness among public sector employees have been uncovered. The report, "What Helps Public Sector Workers Feel Ready for Retirement? An In-Depth Study by Job Tenure, and Other Factors," co-authored by Zhikun Liu, Ph.D., CFP®, Vice President and head of the Institute, sheds light on crucial factors influencing financial confidence in retirement planning. Employee tenure emerged as a pivotal element impacting overall readiness, with long-serving workers exhibiting higher levels of preparedness. This research provides valuable information for policymakers and individuals alike, offering an enhanced understanding of retirement security within the public sector.
news.headline: Report by MissionSquare Research Institute shows less-tenured public sector employees worry more about retirement readiness.

news.summary: Sentar, a prominent company specializing in advanced cybersecurity and intelligence solutions, has recently been honored with the FORUM Innovation Award for its development of two groundbreaking technologies. The award showcases Sentar's commitment to innovation in the industry. Huntsville, Alabama-based Sentar continues to impress by staying at the forefront of technological advancements.
news.headline: Sentar, a cybersecurity company, wins two FORUM Innovation Awards in Huntsville, AL for groundbreaking technologies.

news.summary: In New York, U.S. Immigration Fund (USIF), a prominent EB-5 Regional Center, has proudly announced a major milestone. They have received approval for their first I-526E petition, utilizing their unique EB-5 investor financing loan structure. This approval is for the 1 Journal Square (1JS) project, a mixed-use multifamily development located in Jersey City. USIF facilitates U.S. permanent residency for global families through $800K job creating real estate investments. This achievement highlights their commitment to supporting investors seeking to obtain residency through the EB-5 program.
news.headline: USIF achieves milestone with USCIS approval of I-526E petition, utilizing proprietary loan structure for $800K job-creating investments.
Spot Gold Reduces Gains Following Report About Trump And Xi's Call, Last Seen Increasing By 0.1% At $3,378.59

news.summary: NEO Battery Materials has shown exceptional performance in long-term battery capacity testing with its advanced silicon anode prototype. The company is now gearing up to conduct scale-up battery format tests to further demonstrate the capabilities of their technology. This achievement highlights NEO Battery Materials' potential in revolutionizing the battery industry.
news.headline: NEO Battery's silicon battery excels in long-term capacity tests, advances with silicon anode prototype, and preps for large-scale testing.
$NVDA - NVIDIA’S BIGGEST CHINESE RIVAL HUAWEI STRUGGLES TO WIN AT HOME - TIF

news.summary: MillerKnoll has disclosed the inauguration of its archives at its Michigan Design Yard headquarters. Spanning 12,000 square feet, this unique facility will house the brand's archival collections permanently. Among the holdings are...
news.headline: MillerKnoll opens 12,000 sq ft archives at Michigan Design Yard, housing Herman Miller & Knoll collections.

news.summary: Expansion of Operations and Solutions Portfolio in Acquisition SOMERVILLE, N.J. and HARRISBURG, Pa., June 5, 2025 - In a recent move, dancker, a prominent interior solutions provider, has broadened its reach and services through an acquisition. This strategic decision aims to enhance their offerings by merging integrated furniture, specialty construction, integrated technology, and logistical expertise under one roof. The acquisition, finalized on June 5, is set to significantly increase dancker's footprint and fortify their position in the market. This development marks a milestone for the company as it strengthens its integrated solutions portfolio.
news.headline: dancker expands by acquiring Phillips Workplace Interiors in Harrisburg with CONDIVX. Increased capabilities and portfolio.

news.summary: Bain & Company, a prominent global management consulting firm based in Boston, shared on June 5, 2025, that their clients now have the opportunity to improve their supply chain performance by utilizing advanced AI technology. With this enhancement, businesses can efficiently manage their supply chain operations to reduce carbon emissions and expenses. This innovation also allows companies to capitalize on the financial benefits associated with offering eco-friendly products.
news.headline: Bain & Co partners with Terralytiq to aid supply chain decarbonization, using AI to optimize and deliver lower carbon products.

news.summary: On June 5, 2025, Aprio, the 24th largest business advisory and accounting firm in the United States, revealed the acquisition of O'Connor Consulting Services, LLC (OCS), a Washington, D.C.-based company with a focus on nonprofit business operations. This strategic move indicates Aprio's expansion plans as they strengthen their foothold in the market.
news.headline: Aprio acquires O'Connor Consulting Services, empowering nonprofits with advisory services; Aprio is 24th largest firm in the US.

news.summary: ZINFI Technologies, Inc., a leading global provider of Unified Partner Management and PRM solutions, revealed that the upcoming event in their PartnerOps Symposium Series is scheduled to be held in Denver, Colorado. The event will take place on Thursday, June 5, 2025. This symposium is part of their global initiative to enhance partner operations and engagement.
news.headline: ZINFI to host AI & Automation Leadership Symposium in Denver for PartnerOps leaders; global innovator in UPM & PRM solutions.

news.summary: Mullen Automotive has increased its ownership stake in Bollinger Motors to 95% by acquiring additional shares. The acquisition comes as Bollinger Motors emerges from receivership under its parent company. Both companies reaffirm their dedication to electric vehicle (EV) customers and vehicle service. This development was confirmed on June 5, 2025, in Oak Park, Michigan.
news.headline: Bollinger Motors exits receivership as Mullen Automotive settles claim, now owning 95% stake. Both remain committed to EVs.

news.summary: Approval from regulators represents a significant step forward in the potential acquisition of Pincell, as it fulfills a major requirement outlined in the option agreement. This development allows Scinai to progress towards completing the transaction. The approval was granted on June 5, 2025, in Jerusalem. The acquisition is now subject to customary final conditions before it can be finalized.
news.headline: Scinai Immunotherapeutics approved by Italian gov for acquiring Pincell S.r.l, reaching key milestone in deal, June 5, 2025.

news.summary: A significant restructuring of a multifamily asset portfolio has been completed, involving 18 properties located in rapidly developing regions across the United States. Nitya Capital, a real estate investment company headquartered in Houston and under the leadership of Swapnil Agarwal, has finalized the refinancing deal amounting to $700 million.
news.headline: Nitya Capital, led by Swapnil Agarwal, refinances $700 million multifamily portfolio with 18 assets in high-growth U.S. markets.

news.summary: Boldyn Networks (Boldyn), a prominent neutral host provider, is revolutionizing the digital experience in Long Beach, California. Through the implementation of Wi-Fi 6E and managed services, the venue is now offering faster speeds, simplified access, and new revenue opportunities. This advancement was announced on June 5, 2025. Long Beach residents and visitors can now enjoy enhanced connectivity with Wi-Fi 6E, while Boldyn Networks continues to establish itself as a global leader in neutral host services.
news.headline: Long Beach Convention Center partners with Boldyn Networks for faster Wi-Fi speeds and analytics, enhancing digital experience.

news.summary: A new platform called AgentC™ has been introduced by Knotch in New York on June 5, 2025. AgentC™ is a combination of agentic AI and human expertise that aims to enhance content, media, journeys, and growth for businesses. Knotch, known as the top digital optimization platform for Fortune 1000 brands, has brought forth this innovation to provide verified outputs that teams can rely on.
news.headline: Knotch launches AgentC, combining AI and human expertise to optimize content, media, journeys, and growth for marketers.

news.summary: In anticipation of the summer season, KFC in Louisville, Ky., has introduced the new Mountain Dew Sweet Lightning Peaches & Cream "Dirty" Soda. This innovative beverage is set to accelerate the summer vibes and delight customers' taste buds. The menu re-launch includes the iconic Fill Ups meal deal. This partnership with F1 THE MOVIE is an exciting collaboration that promises to add an extra layer of excitement to the dining experience. Get ready for a thrilling summer filled with delicious food and refreshing drinks at KFC.
news.headline: KFC brings back Fill Ups meal deal in collab with F1 THE MOVIE, launches new Mountain Dew Sweet Lightning soda.

news.summary: In China, a recent report highlights the country's environmental conservation efforts, as flowers have started to blossom in the formerly barren Taklimakan Desert, dubbed the "Sea of Death". Over 100,000 rose saplings were planted in November, contributing to this flourishing transformation. This initiative symbolizes China's commitment to combating desertification and promoting sustainable practices in the region.
news.headline: 100,000 roses bloom in China's Taklimakan Desert, once a "Sea of Death", highlighting environmental progress.

news.summary: Reejig, a leading developer of AI-powered Work Intelligence, has unveiled its latest integration with SAP SuccessFactors in New York on June 5, 2025. This collaboration aims to assist enterprises in managing large-scale AI-driven workforce transformations and addressing the skills-work gap. This partnership is expected to revolutionize the industry by leveraging advanced technologies to enhance organizational efficiency.
news.headline: Reejig AI-Powered Work Intelligence now on SAP® Store, helps enterprises with AI-driven workforce transformation.

news.summary: Recently launched by nT-Tao, the first-ever Israel Fusion Forum aims to establish the nation as a key player in shaping the future of clean energy worldwide. Taking place in Tel Aviv on June 5, 2025, this forum signifies Israel's commitment to leading the way in the global fusion energy sector. This initiative underscores Israel's dedication to playing a significant role in the clean energy transition. The event marks a crucial step in positioning Israel as a hub for innovation and collaboration in the clean energy space, emphasizing the country's determination to contribute to the advancement of fusion energy.
news.headline: Israel Fusion Forum launched by nT-Tao to lead global clean energy movement; aims to accelerate fusion energy ecosystem.

news.summary: A renowned global awards program has acknowledged exemplary educational technology products and companies. Learning.com, a prominent digital literacy solutions provider based in Portland, Oregon, was revealed on June 5, 2025, as the recipient of the top honor in the competition. Their exceptional performance was recognized by the international panel of judges, solidifying their position as a leader in the industry. This recognition underscores Learning.com's commitment to innovation and excellence in the field of educational technology.
news.headline: Learning.com wins "Overall e-Learning Company of the Year" award at 7th EdTech Breakthrough Awards. Leading provider in digital literacy.

news.summary: On June 5, 2025, in Chicago, The Reunion Project introduced the AWARE LTS Leadership Academy to commemorate HIV Long-Term Survivors Awareness Day. This innovative program aims to nurture emerging leaders from the community.
news.headline: The Reunion Project launches AWARE LTS Leadership Academy on HIV Long-Term Survivors Awareness Day in Chicago.

news.summary: Cineo Lighting has unveiled their latest products, the Cineo LYNX Full-Color LED Lights available in 2' and 4' sizes. These lights are pixel-mappable and are intended for use by production and broadcast lighting professionals. The announcement was made at the Cine Gear Expo 2025 in CHANDLER, Ariz. on June 5, 2025. For more information, visit the company's website www.cineolighting.com.
news.headline: Cineo Lighting introduces LYNX Full-Color LED Light Bars at Cine Gear Expo LA, including 2' and 4' options. #innovation #lighting
ECB's President Lagarde: While Euro Area banks remain resilient, broader financial stability risks remain elevated.

news.summary: On June 5, 2025, the company BTL, known for its non-invasive medical solutions, shared the news of an extended Health Canada License regarding its EMSELLA® platform. This development underlines BTL's expertise in pelvic health and intimate wellness. The platform is FDA-cleared and now holds an expanded license in Canada.
news.headline: BTL expands EMSELLA® platform clearances in Canada, reinforcing its leadership in pelvic health; FDA-cleared.
